title: Oh Boy a Low Level Cobblemon
description: Cobblemon Modpack for the OBALL SMP with tons of Cobblemon Addons and plenty of non-Cobblemon content to supplement the experience.
body:
# Welcome to Oh Boy a Low Level Cobblemon!
A featuerful Cobblemon modpack with plenty of non-Cobblemon features for players who don't find themselves so enamored with the Cobblemon focused side of the pack. Generally speaking OBALLC is fairly performant and should run well on low settings with shaders off on most systems although, for anyone with a higher end system, it comes preloaded on high settings with Mellow shaders. 
The core mods for this pack are: 
- Cobblemon
- Farmers Delight
- The Aether
- Many More Ores and Crafts
---

OBBALC uses 24 cobblemon addons, mods, and resourcepacks to grant further depth and content to the primary focus of the pack, a variety of new structures, randomly generated Cobblemon gyms, fierce wild trainers, and the challenging gym leaders provide hundreds of hours of cobblemon content. For the less Cobblemon enclined player, there are dozens of new blocks to build with, dozens of new food and farming related recipes, and the entirety of The Aether to be explored and conquered. 

--- 
This pack is designed for, and balanced around, small/medium SMPs of 2-20 players, although playing alone is perfectly fine, and playing with more people is perfectly viable, a large part of the enjoyment both of Cobblemon and of OBALLC is in building a sense of community, battling against friends, and trading with eachother. 

---
## Today Your Journey Begins
